title: MD
biography: Yoshinori Ohsumi is a Japanese cell biologist who discovered the mechanisms of autophagy, the cell's recycling system. Nobel Prize 2016.
aiSummary: Yoshinori Ohsumi is a cell biology specialist at Tokyo Institute of Technology. Based in Japan.
awards: Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine (2016)

timeline.title: Discovered autophagy genes in yeast
timeline.description: Identified key genes controlling autophagy using baker's yeast

timeline.title: Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine
